things.name: Old Bazaar (Carsija)
things.description: One of the Balkans' largest and oldest bazaars with mosques, hans and artisan workshops

things.name: Skopje Fortress (Kale)
things.description: Byzantine and Ottoman fortress above the city with panoramic views

things.name: Stone Bridge (Kamen Most)
things.description: Iconic 15th-century Ottoman bridge connecting the old and new city

things.name: Macedonia Square
things.description: Grand central square with an enormous equestrian statue of Alexander the Great

things.name: Matka Canyon
things.description: Spectacular lake-gorge just 15km from the city, a paradise for kayaking and cave exploration

things.name: National Museum of North Macedonia
things.description: Archaeological and historical treasures from the Neolithic to Ottoman eras

things.name: Painted Mosque (Sarena Dzamija)
things.description: Beautifully painted 15th-century mosque in Tetovo with floral frescoes

things.name: Millennium Cross
things.description: 66-metre illuminated cross on Mount Vodno overlooking Skopje

things.name: Mother Teresa Memorial House
things.description: Memorial to Agnes Gonxhe Bojaxhiu, born in Skopje in 1910

things.name: Sveti Naum Monastery
things.description: Beautiful lakeside monastery on the shores of Lake Ohrid
